pages.title: Status & Progression
pages.text: $(thing)/horizons status$() -- View your Pathfinder level, perk points, faction standings, and Crime Stat$(br2)$(thing)/horizons nutrition$() -- Check your current food group saturation scores$(br2)$(thing)/horizons reputation$() -- View your standing with all six factions$(br2)$(thing)/horizons gate$() -- View your deepest floor reached per Gate tier$(br2)$(thing)/horizons perks$() -- Open the perk tree interface$(br2)$(thing)/horizons trust$() -- Check companion trust levels for your active Cobblemon

pages.title: Social & Economy
pages.text: $(thing)/bal$() -- Check your Lightman's Currency balance$(br2)$(thing)/pay [player] [amount]$() -- Send coins to another player$(br2)$(thing)/jobs$() -- View available professions and your current job level$(br2)$(thing)/ftbteams$() -- Manage your team, invite players, set permissions$(br2)$(thing)/ftbchunks claim$() -- Claim the chunk you are standing in to protect it from other players$(br2)$(thing)/bounty$() -- View active bounties and your hunter status

pages.title: Cobblemon & Travel
pages.text: $(thing)/pc$() -- Access your Cobblemon PC storage remotely$(br2)$(thing)/pokestats$() -- View your active Cobblemon team details$(br2)$(thing)/duel [player]$() -- Challenge another player to a Cobblemon duel$(br2)$(thing)/warp list$() -- View available Warp Anchor destinations$(br2)$(thing)/warp [name]$() -- Travel to a discovered Warp Anchor$(br2)$(thing)/home$() -- Return to your set home location$(br2)$(thing)/sethome$() -- Set your home spawn point at your current location
